effectsRaw: Rear: 96x3W CW + 108x0.5W RGB + 9x10W CW beam LEDs
description: Multi-source beam/wash moving head with four 60W RGBW front cells, rear CW strobe array, and 2.5-28° zoom for versatile aerial and wash effects.

effectsRaw: 5 independent pan/tilt heads + 120 RGB ring LEDs
description: IP66-rated linear fixture with five independently controlled 120W RGBL moving heads and a 120-LED RGB ring, designed for outdoor touring and festivals.

effectsRaw: Dual-function: 5x60W RGBW bar + 36x18W CW strobe (18 zones)
description: Dual-function bar and strobe fixture combining a 5-cell RGBW color section with a 36-LED cool white strobe section delivering 41,000 lumens across 18 pixel zones.

effectsRaw: 4-facet prism + 4-facet linear prism, 4-blade framing shutters, animation wheel
description: IP66-rated 1000W LED profile with CMY mixing, dual prisms, framing shutters, and animation wheel. Delivers 35,000 lumens in standard mode or 25,600 lm at CRI >90.
Compact IP66 wash beam with 7x150W RGBL LEDs delivering 19,500 lumens through a tight 3-32° zoom, with variable CTO down to 2500K.

effectsRaw: 2 prism effects, frost filter, 14 dichroic colors + white
description: Compact 260W discharge beam moving head with razor-sharp 2° beam, dual prisms, frost, and 6000-hour Philips Platinum 12R LL lamp.

effectsRaw: 13-lens optical system, triple variable color temperature corrector
description: Record-output 1000W LED wash delivering 51,000 lumens through a 225mm front lens with 15:1 zoom ratio and triple variable color temperature correction.

effectsRaw: 270mm front lens, 13-lens optical system, integrated CRMX wireless
description: Ultra-powerful 1200W IP65 LED followspot/profile delivering 55,000 lumens and over 100,000 lux at 10m through a massive 270mm front lens.

effectsRaw: 225mm front optics, 13-lens optical system, IP65 rated, integrated CRMX wireless
description: IP65-rated 1000W LED profile with 15:1 zoom, 225mm XXL optics, and full CMY mixing. Delivers 51,000 lumens for large-scale outdoor touring.

effectsRaw: 7 individually controllable RGBW cells with continuous tilt rotation
description: Compact 7-cell RGBW LED tilt bar with continuous rotation and 3.6-53° zoom per cell for dramatic sweeping beam and wash effects.

effectsRaw: 896 RGB SMD LEDs + 432 CW LEDs, 180° motorized tilt
description: IP65 hybrid strobe/wash with 180° motorized tilt, combining RGB wash and intense CW strobe modes for up to 71,620 lumens combined output.
Compact 350W LED spot with CMY mixing, 5-facet prism, iris, frost, and wide 4-43° zoom for mid-size touring and theatre.
Full-featured 440W LED spot with CMY+CTO mixing, dual rotating gobo wheels, 3-facet prism, and variable frost for touring productions.

effectsRaw: Four-blade framing with 120° rotation, 2 layerable prisms, animation wheel, adjustable CRI 74-93
description: Flagship 820W LED profile with 9:1 zoom, four-blade framing, adjustable CRI (74-93), dual prisms, and animation wheel for broadcast and touring.

effectsRaw: 19x45W RGBW LEDs + 12-zone RGB outer ring with stealth filter
description: IP65-rated 19-cell RGBW beam/wash with 12-zone RGB outer ring, delivering nearly 10,000 lumens through a wide 3.6-53.4° zoom.
Lightweight IP65 LED beam fixture with ultra-narrow 1.4° beam angle from a 160mm front lens. Built for outdoor events and festivals.
Compact IP65 RGBW wash with 19 quad-color LEDs, 5 pixel zones, and wide 8-66° zoom in a lightweight 10.6 kg body.

effectsRaw: 7x40W RGBW LEDs, selectable PWM for flicker-free operation
description: Ultra-compact 7-cell RGBW beam/wash under 12 lbs with 5-58° zoom and flicker-free operation for corporate events and installations.

effectsRaw: 19x25W RGBW quad-LEDs, 5 zones of LED control for pixel mapping
description: Versatile 19-cell RGBW wash with 5 pixel-mappable zones, wide 7.3-64.3° zoom, and powerCON pass-through in a compact indoor package.

effectsRaw: Four independent overlapping framing blades on four focal planes, animation wheel, prism

Versatile 440W discharge hybrid (beam/spot/wash) with 160mm front lens, delivering 22,000 lumens with tight 2.5° beam mode and wide 50° wash.
IP66 evolution of the legendary Sharpy beam with 250W custom HID lamp delivering 100,000 lux at 20m through a razor-sharp 2° beam.
Industry-defining 189W compact beam fixture with legendary punch-to-weight ratio. The original sharp-beam moving light that set the standard.

effectsRaw: RGB laser source, sealed module, 20,000 hr lifetime, ultra-narrow 1° beam

effectsRaw: 12x60W RGBW pixel-controlled LEDs + SparkLED FX + strobe lines

effectsRaw: Continuous 360° pan and tilt rotation, 50W RGB LED

effectsRaw: 0.8° ultra-narrow beam, 335,000 lux @ 15m, Philips MSD Platinum 500L Flex lamp

effectsRaw: TruTone variable CRI (70-93), framing shutters, prism, iris, frost
